form.formComment: Last start finished last over 340m at this track beaten 12 lengths (20.90) behind Lola Mcgraw in a Grade 5 on April 8. Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished last over 340m at this track beaten 12 lengths (20.90) behind Lola Mcgraw in a Grade 5 on April 8. Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was bumped and became unbalanced over the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last on April 8 over 340m at this track behind Bear Man beaten 9 lengths (20.43) in a Grade 5. Better than the last couple of runs suggest. Expected to do much better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished last on April 8 over 340m at this track behind Bear Man beaten 9 lengths (20.43) in a Grade 5. Better than the last couple of runs suggest. Expected to do much better.

form.formComment: Needs to do more than recent efforts, the latest a eighth over 340m at this track. Likely to find this a bit tough.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Needs to do more than recent efforts, the latest a eighth over 340m at this track. Likely to find this a bit tough.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Stumbled at the start and lost considerable ground.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and tends to spot them a start in her races, Last start finished seventh over 340m at this track, beaten 17 lengths. Prepared to overlook.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and tends to spot them a start in her races, Last start finished seventh over 340m at this track, beaten 17 lengths. Prepared to overlook.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked exiting the home turn and was momentarily turned inwardly.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage seventh last time out over 318m at Dubbo. Predicted to struggle on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage seventh last time out over 318m at Dubbo. Predicted to struggle on this occasion.

form.formComment: At the last start finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 4 over 340m at this track behind Jacobite Knife beaten 8 lengths (20.72). Must be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: At the last start finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 4 over 340m at this track behind Jacobite Knife beaten 8 lengths (20.72). Must be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted wider in the home straight and bumped on a number of occasions.

form.formComment: At the last start finished 7th over 400m at The Gardens beaten 17 lengths (24.39) behind Melissa's Lady in a Grade 5 on March 12. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: At the last start finished 7th over 400m at The Gardens beaten 17 lengths (24.39) behind Melissa's Lady in a Grade 5 on March 12. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted outwardly on the home turn and came together.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Dubbo (23.89) in a Grade 5, finishing a 13 length eighth. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Expected to be in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at Dubbo (23.89) in a Grade 5, finishing a 13 length eighth. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage eighth last time out over 340m at this track. This will test.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage eighth last time out over 340m at this track. This will test.

form.formComment: Ended last campaign with a eighth (23.92) in a GR 5 at The Gardens and returns after a four-and-a-half months break. Looks a key runner while fresh.

formComments.comment: Ended last campaign with a eighth (23.92) in a GR 5 at The Gardens and returns after a four-and-a-half months break. Looks a key runner while fresh.
